seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Havilah and Hawkesbury Heights. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Havilah vs Hawkesbury Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Havilah and Hawkesbury Heights.
heading: Havilah vs Hawkesbury Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Havilah, New South Wales and Hawkesbury Heights, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Havilah has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Hawkesbury Heights (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Havilah or Hawkesbury Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Havilah has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Hawkesbury Heights scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Havilah scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Hawkesbury Heights scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Havilah or Hawkesbury Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Havilah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
